title: Midterm pushed back to the week of Oct 20th
content:
Midterm exam is pushed back to the week of Oct 20th. Before the test, I will put together a practice midterm with solutions and a study guide to help you with the preparation. If we have time, we will cover some of these materials in class. 

 

Here are some logistics:

1) The exam will be in class (thus, in person).

2) The exam is closed books/notes and no access to accepi.

3) You will be required to use Excel (blank spreadsheet)

4) You are allowed to use a formula sheet (one page, front and back). You are allowed to create your own formula sheet, and it can include anything that you think will help you during the test. The formula sheet has to be printed (cannot be stored on your laptop or tablet). 

5) I will ask that you upload in Canvas your exam work (Excel spreadsheet + pictures of your hand work)

6) If you require accommodations, I will contact you separately to make arrangements

 

Please let me know if you have questions,

Julian
contentText:
Midterm exam is pushed back to the week of Oct 20th. Before the test, I will put together a practice midterm with solutions and a study guide to help you with the preparation. If we have time, we will cover some of these materials in class. 
 
Here are some logistics:
1) The exam will be in class (thus, in person).
2) The exam is closed books/notes and no access to accepi.
3) You will be required to use Excel (blank spreadsheet)
4) You are allowed to use a formula sheet (one page, front and back). You are allowed to create your own formula sheet, and it can include anything that you think will help you during the test. The formula sheet has to be printed (cannot be stored on your laptop or tablet). 
5) I will ask that you upload in Canvas your exam work (Excel spreadsheet + pictures of your hand work)
6) If you require accommodations, I will contact you separately to make arrangements
 
Please let me know if you have questions,
Julian
author: Iulian Obreja
